scenes.beat: There's a jellyfish that, when it's about to die, simply grows young again.
scenes.visual: HOOK. Abyssal radial gradient (#0a1018 center to #0d1622 edge) with slow downward marine-snow particles. Dead center and LARGE (fills ~55% of frame height): one translucent bell-shaped jellyfish in layered SVG paths — glowing cyan dome (#7FE7E0) over a soft inner #4FC3D9 glow blob, a thin gold rim highlight on the bell, four short oral arms and a fan of thin #FF8FB1 tentacles trailing below. Slammed across the upper third in heavy white type: the shock line 'IT CAN'T DIE.' with 'CAN'T' enlarged and recolored gold (#FFD23F). A gold pill badge clings to the top-right of the bell holding a bold white '?' to pose the mystery. One faint gold ripple ring sits behind the creature. No clutter — just the giant jelly, three blunt words, and the badge.
scenes.animations: Jellyfish springs in from 72% to full scale with a gentle overshoot (spring damping ~14, mass 0.6) in the first 0.4s, then locks into a slow continuous bell-pulse loop — squash on contract, stretch on release — so it visibly swims in place; tentacles trail on a soft sine sway. The white hook words punch in word-by-word over the first ~1.2s, each with a hard spring overshoot; 'CAN'T' lands hardest with an extra scale punch and a single gold flash. The '?' badge pops 0.3s after the jelly with a punchy spring and emits one gold ring that sweeps outward and fades. Marine-snow drifts down throughout. No camera zoom-pulse.
scenes.sfx: a soft deep underwater sonar ping with a watery bubble-shimmer tail

scenes.beat: It's barely bigger than a fingernail, but it carries one of nature's strangest tricks.
scenes.visual: Scale-shock shot. The jelly recenters and shrinks tiny, set beside a clean #5C6B7A line-art human fingertip with a drawn fingernail on the left. A thin gold dimension bracket spans the nail width with a gold tick label reading '~4mm', visibly dwarfing the speck-sized glowing-cyan jelly tucked beside it. Background stays abyssal with drifting particles. The contrast of the bright cyan dot against the muted gray nail sells how absurdly small it is.
scenes.animations: Fingernail outline draws-on stroke-by-stroke, left to right. The gold dimension bracket sweeps open horizontally and the '~4mm' label pops in with a spring. The tiny jellyfish does a quick scale-down shrink with a spring settle to sit beside the bracket, then resumes a miniature bell-pulse. A subtle gold underline sweeps beneath the label. Particles keep drifting.
scenes.sfx: a small high crystalline glass tick and measuring chime

scenes.beat: When it's injured, starving, or old, it doesn't give up. Instead, its body collapses into a blob and sinks to the seafloor.
scenes.visual: Three gold-outlined condition icons flash across the top, each in a gold pill: a cracked red-tinged bell (#FF5A6E) for INJURED, a hollow empty bell for STARVING, a faded gray bell for OLD. Below, the main jellyfish loses its form — crisp bell and tentacles melt and morph into a rounded amorphous #4FC3D9 blob. A muted #5C6B7A seafloor ridge with a few rocks sits along the bottom. The collapsed blob descends through the water column toward the seafloor, leaving a faint cyan trail.
scenes.animations: The three condition icons spring-pop in a snappy stagger, each dimming after it lands. The bell path-morphs into the blob — tentacles retract, dome rounds out, color desaturates. The blob then sinks with eased gravity and gently squashes on contact with the seafloor; a small sand-particle burst puffs out on landing. The seafloor ridge draws-on as the blob falls. No zoom-pulse.
scenes.sfx: a low gloopy underwater glug that settles into a soft sediment thud

scenes.beat: And then its cells transform, rewinding it back into its baby stage, like a butterfly turning back into a caterpillar.
scenes.visual: HERO REVEAL — THE MONEY SHOT. The blob on the seafloor is magnified into one big central circular cell-view lens (ring of gold ~440px diameter, dominating the frame). Inside the lens: a tight honeycomb of ~14 rounded hexagonal cells in violet (#9D7BE8). As we watch, each specialized adult cell visibly DEDIFFERENTIATES — it loses its detailed inner structure, rounds out, and color-shifts from #9D7BE8 violet to a bright glowing stem-cell white-violet (#C9B3FF), then re-packs into a fresh uniform grid. Thin light filaments arc between cells as they reorganize. A bold gold 'REWIND' loop-arrow (◄◄ curve) wraps the outside of the lens. To the right, a compact morph timeline: an adult medusa silhouette scrubs BACKWARD (leftward) and path-morphs into a stalked baby polyp; directly beneath it, a small gold-line butterfly icon cross-dissolves into a caterpillar icon to drive home the reversal. Everything else on screen is dimmed so the lens is unmistakably the focal point.
scenes.animations: The lens irises open via a circular mask reveal with a gold ring sweep (0.5s). Inside, the cells animate in a continuous reorganizing churn: each cell springs to a new grid position (staggered spring, damping ~12) while its fill tweens #9D7BE8 -> #C9B3FF and its inner detail fades out, then a faint stem-glow pulse blooms across the whole grid. Light filaments draw-on between neighboring cells as they settle. The gold REWIND arrow draws-on, then loops its sweep. On the timeline the medusa silhouette path-morphs backward into the polyp with a smooth reverse-scrub easing, and the butterfly cross-dissolves into the caterpillar in sync. This is the longest, richest, most detailed beat — the emotional and visual peak. No camera zoom-pulse; all motion is in-comp.
scenes.sfx: a reverse time-rewind whoosh layered with a shimmering bio-electric sparkle swell

scenes.beat: From there, it grows up all over again. In theory, it can repeat this cycle forever.
scenes.visual: A clean circular life-cycle diagram centered on a thin gold ring with four glowing nodes — POLYP (baby), JUVENILE, ADULT MEDUSA, COLLAPSE-BLOB — each a small cyan/violet icon with a tiny gold label. A bright light tracer travels the ring clockwise leaving a gold comet trail; on reaching the medusa node it loops back to the polyp node, closing the cycle so the arrow never breaks. A faint gold infinity hint glows at the ring's center. Abyssal background with gentle particles.
scenes.animations: The four nodes spring-pop in around the ring in clockwise sequence. A glowing tracer particle sweeps the full loop as a path-follow draw-on of the gold trail; on completing one lap it speeds up and runs a second faster lap to imply 'forever.' Each node briefly pulses as the tracer passes. On loop close the whole ring gives one soft synchronized glow-pulse. No zoom-pulse.
scenes.sfx: a rising looping chime arpeggio that resolves into a gentle bell shimmer

scenes.beat: ...which is why scientists call it the immortal jellyfish.
scenes.visual: PAYOFF. The jellyfish returns to full glory, centered and glowing bright cyan with a radiant halo, pulsing serenely. Across the lower third the punchline slams in word-by-word in heavy white type: 'IT' / 'NEVER' / 'TRULY' / 'DIES' — with 'NEVER' enlarged and rendered in gold (#FFD23F). A thin gold infinity symbol glints beside the jelly. Starlike particles brighten around the bell.
scenes.animations: Each of the four payoff words flies in word-by-word with a strong spring overshoot and settle (tight stagger ~0.12s apart); 'NEVER' lands hardest with an extra scale punch and a gold flash. The jellyfish does one big triumphant bell-pulse synced to 'DIES'. The gold infinity symbol draws-on in a single continuous stroke and gets one gold glint sweep across it. Halo particles bloom outward then ease to a calm twinkle on the hold. No zoom-pulse.
scenes.sfx: a clean confident reveal sting — soft cosmic bell chord with a watery shimmer accent
